title: Image description
description: Description of the content of an image, as generated by a vision inference model
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries the natural-language output produced by a vision model when asked to describe an image. The payload is plain text, but the `image-description` tag conveys that the text is specifically a model-generated caption or description rather than arbitrary prose.

## When to use
Use `media:image-description;textable` as the output type of vision inference nodes that produce textual descriptions of images. Downstream nodes expecting general text may treat this interchangeably with [Plain Text](https://capdag.com/browse/media:txt;textable), while nodes that specifically aggregate or index image descriptions can match on the more specific type.

## Notes
The text content is unstructured natural language. If a structured representation (e.g. tags, bounding boxes) is needed, a different media type should be defined. The `textable` tag allows this type to participate in any pipeline that accepts readable text.
